groups.label: 1. Local preview
steps: Replace placeholder supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey, and stripePublishableKey values.
Run the local preview server and confirm /admin/status/ shows Local Config looks wired.
Open /admin/execute/ and confirm the runtime surface matrix and live verification matrix match the local-preview flows you expect to test.

groups.label: 2. Staging deploy
steps: Apply the migration order from live_wiring_manifest.json on staging Supabase, including the CP115 entitlement lifecycle migration.
Set Netlify env vars using netlify/env/netlify.staging.example.
Register the Stripe webhook endpoint for staging and copy the signing secret into Netlify.
Open /admin/status/ and confirm deployment badge, exact price-matrix truth, billing readiness, marketplace readiness, and webhook readiness are green.
Open /admin/execute/ and verify the live verification matrix is unblocked for member checkout, business checkout, token top-ups, and plan-swap entitlement cleanup.

groups.label: 3. Production deploy (prelaunch sandbox)
steps: Copy production values only after staging passes end-to-end.
Use netlify/env/netlify.production.example as the canonical source for env var names.
Keep Stripe on sandbox/test keys, prices, portal config, and webhook secrets until launch day. Do not cut live mode here.
Verify /api/health and /api/public_config on the deployed domain before announcing the prelaunch environment internally.
Run the full QA gate suite one more time after production deploy, re-check /admin/execute/, complete the release closeout packet, and prepare a separate launch-day cutover checklist for live mode.
